provenance.notes: Sticker slice of rich-messages reviewed. Evidence bundle is complete (build/test/lint/structural/ui/smoke all pass), architecture-reviewer confirms layering preserved, and security-reviewer confirms no secret leakage. The two known risks (pack derivation from recent usage, sticker body plaintext at rest) are low-severity and explicitly accepted with documented mitigations. Accept.

diffCoverage.notes: All eight changed source files covered. Architecture-reviewer and security-reviewer pass independently. Evidence bundle has all required checks (build/test/lint/structural/ui/smoke) plus the ui artifact.

findings.evidence: Evidence bundle passes all required gates: build, test, lint, structural, ui (npm build), and smoke (live send_sticker_live). Two low-severity known risks accepted with documented owner + mitigation.
Task contract scope (sticker slice only) matches the evidence bundle. Non-goals (links, reactions, attachments) are explicitly documented. Acceptance criteria all met.

summary: Advisor review: the sticker slice evidence is complete and runnable. Build/test/lint/structural/ui gates are green with attested hashes. The live smoke (send_sticker_live) passed. Architecture and security reviewers independently approve. Known risks are low-severity and accepted. Approve.
